testCases.title: Semantic gate and conversation state expose turn-card decisions, not runtime-native question UI
testCases.expectedBehavior: pm_semantic_intent_gate returns TurnCardDecisionSpec and WorkflowContract projections and does not return legacy runtime-native question UI fields.

testCases.title: Approved SIC and DTC refs cannot route workflow-control-plane work without FDE provenance
testCases.expectedBehavior: pm_semantic_intent_gate and pm_intent_router return contract_required for ontology-engineering workflow-control-plane mutations until an FDEOntologyEngineeringSession ref or current session exists.

testCases.title: Claude and Codex consume the same turn-card workflow contract
testCases.expectedBehavior: Claude-labeled and Codex-labeled invocations produce the same stable gate/router/workflow shapes, with only runtime identity and project-local refs differing.

testCases.title: pm_ontology_engineering_workflow authorizes mutation only after approved SIC and DTC
testCases.expectedBehavior: start, turn, and draft_sic keep mutationAuthorized=false; status reaches mutation-authorized only after both SemanticIntentContract and DigitalTwinChangeContract are approved.

testCases.title: PreToolUse hook blocks runtime UI, missing FDE provenance, and unauthorized workflow mutation
testCases.expectedBehavior: ontology-engineering-workflow-enforcement-gate denies runtime-specific question UI tools, denies SIC/DTC routing before FDE workflow provenance, and denies protected workflow-surface edits until mutationAuthorized=true.
